lockFileMaintenance.description: Interim mechanism for transitive npm vulnerability coverage: a weekly lockfile regeneration picks up in-range fixes for indirect dependencies that never appear in package.json. Alert-driven transitive remediation is unimplemented upstream (open idea thread: https://github.com/renovatebot/renovate/discussions/41825) and the former transitiveRemediation option was removed from Renovate. Refs https://github.com/vig-os/devkit/issues/1041.

packageRules.description: GitHub Actions — semantic commit + group minor/patch
GitHub Actions — major updates stay separate

requires-python is a deliberate range: the Nix toolchain pins the exact interpreter via flake.lock, so an == pin is redundant and unsatisfiable against nixpkgs. Exempt it from the pin rule above. Refs #666.
npm — group dev dependencies (they never ship in the bundle)
npm — group runtime minor/patch; majors stay separate
